name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement

labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. Note which layer it touches (Domain / SharedKernel / a module
(`AgentOs.Modules.*`) / Api / Web) if you know.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed.

## Additional context

Links, mockups, related issues.
